role: Senior engineer mapping an existing serverless Python codebase
instruction: Read broadly before editing. Map collection, normalization, relevance filtering, scoring, persistence, summarization, rendering and delivery. Report how sources are defined, how a new source is added, where collection and report windows are set and how locks work.
constraints: Do not edit code, deploy AWS resources or send email
stop_after: Return the pipeline map, risks and recommended Stage 2 scope, then stop.
